begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memer_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as member_group , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no )) as member_group_name , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.cal_shr_auto from sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = '025658' order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no

r_tge_loan_approve_norm_atm_nest.sql: select trim(sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.short_name)||' - '||trim(sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no) as bank_acc_no from sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno , sc_acc_m_ucf_bank where sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id and sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.atm_lon = '1' and sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.membership_no = {0} --and sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.membership_no = '025658' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.membership_no , sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.seq_no
